anomalies.description: NEW Run132: BTC LONG boost rule claims 63.9% WR but 100d backtest shows 31.7% WR EV=-$13.42/trade. Rule is promoting a loser. Must deactivate restored_btc_long_boost_v1.
Day 76 offline. Zero revenue. All feedback loops frozen.
Kelly=-0.168, WR=44.5% vs 52.5% needed. Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27.
AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL: HYPE SHORT <75% conf = +$808 EV blocked (EV=+$10.10/trade, WR=53.8%, n=80).
80-90% conf = 40% WR (worst tier, EV=-$33.04). Paradox sizing rule active but untested live.
HYPE 38% of trades, 68% of losses. Sizing cap 0.5x active in graduated rules.
LONGs 39.5% WR vs SHORTs 46.4% WR. SHORT is structurally better direction.
NEW Run132: SOL SHORT boost only valid at 75-80% conf (WR=52.9%, EV=+$24.26). Sub-75% losses boosted unnecessarily.

run132_findings.confirmed_fixed: graduated_rules.py code bug (time-bomb) is PATCHED in codebase
run132_findings.confirmed: HYPE LONG veto economically correct (EV=-$14.36/trade despite 50% WR)
run132_findings.alpha_blocked: HYPE SHORT <75%: +$808 EV, 12th consecutive run awaiting approval
